case_title: CALIFORNIA STATE EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION NO 2 VS HOWARD MARGUERITE B

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,230.29 FILED BY CALIFORNIA STATE EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION NO 2 AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD MARGUERITE B ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD MARGUERITE B

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA STATE EMPLOYEES CREDIT UNION NO 2 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOWARD MARGUERITE B $2,230.29 PRINCIPAL, $16.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,246.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HOWARD MARGUERITE B
